source.paper_title: BioAgent Bench: An AI Agent Evaluation Suite for Bioinformatics

experiments.name: Alzheimer Mouse Models: Comparative Pathway Analysis
experiments.task: Analyze 5xFAD, 3xTG-AD, and PS301S mouse model data by normalizing counts, running differential expression, performing KEGG pathway enrichment, and comparing shared pathways across models.

experiments.name: Comparative Genomics: Co-evolving Gene Clusters
experiments.task: Use Micrococcus genome FASTA and GFF data to reconstruct phylogenetic relationships among orthologous co-evolving genes, identify conserved gene clusters, and group them into co-evolving functional modules.

experiments.name: Cystic Fibrosis Mendelian Variant Identification
experiments.task: Analyze a simulated family sequencing dataset derived from the CEPH 1463 panel to identify the mutation responsible for a Mendelian recessive cystic fibrosis phenotype.

experiments.name: RNA-Seq Differential Expression (DESeq2)
experiments.task: Perform DESeq2 differential expression analysis on Candida parapsilosis RNA-seq samples from planktonic and biofilm conditions to find genes associated with biofilm-related transcriptional change.

experiments.name: Experimental Evolution Variant Calling (E. coli)
experiments.task: Call genomic variants in evolved E. coli lines relative to an ancestor using paired-end sequencing reads that have already been filtered for PhiX and adapter contamination.

experiments.name: GIAB Variant Calling (NA12878)
experiments.task: Perform germline variant calling for the NA12878 GIAB exome dataset on GRCh38 using the supplied high-confidence benchmark resources.

experiments.name: Metagenomics: Community Comparison (Cuatro Cienegas)
experiments.task: Profile bacterial taxonomic composition from Cuatro Cienegas Basin metagenomic reads and report relative abundances for control and nutrient-enriched community samples.

experiments.name: Single-cell RNA-seq: Skeletal Muscle Exercise Response
experiments.task: Analyze human skeletal muscle single-cell RNA-seq data collected before and after acute exercise to identify cell types and characterize their transcriptional responses.

experiments.name: Transcript Quantification (Simulated RNA-Seq)
experiments.task: Quantify transcript expression from paired-end simulated RNA-seq reads against a provided transcriptome reference and recover the exact transcript-level count table.

experiments.name: Viral Metagenomics: Species Identification (Dolphin)
experiments.task: Analyze paired-end dolphin fecal metagenomic reads to assemble contigs, classify them, and identify viral species present in a gastroenteritis-associated sample.
